basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Non Academic Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 28 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) has published the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) Notification 2026 on 13 June 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 28 Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 37 years and holding an MBBS degree from an MCI-recognized institute with completed compulsory rotatory internship are eligible to apply through walk-in mode at the official website. The recruitment process will be conducted on 16 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and other impo

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST up to 5 years, OBC up to 3 years, PwBD General 10 years, OBC 13 years, SC/ST 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from MCI recognized institute with completed compulsory rotatory internship
qualification.details: MBBS from MCI recognized institute. Candidate must have completed compulsory rotatory internship and must produce an internship completion certificate.

selection_process: Interview Written Examination (if large number of candidates) Document Verification

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Gorakhpur Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) Job 2026 Notific

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) posts at AIIMS Gorakhpur is scheduled for 16th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report as per the specified time for registration.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) positions at AIIMS Gorakhpur. These are ad-hoc positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) post is an MBBS degree from an MCI-recognized institute, along with the completion of a compulsory rotatory internship and a valid certificate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Non-Academic Junior Resident (Medical) post is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, plus NPA, as per Level-10 of the pay matrix.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report to the AIIMS Gorakhpur office on the specified date with all required original documents and self-attested copies.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You must carry original and self-attested photocopies of your ID proof, educational certificates (MBBS degree, internship completion certificate), and category certificate (if applicable). Passport-size photographs are also recommended.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the General/OBC category?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500. For SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 250, and for PwBD candidates, there is no fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. However, a written examination may be conducted if there is a large number of candidates. Document verification will also be part of the process.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur. Candidates should report to the AIIMS Gorakhpur office on the day of the interview.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
